review: After interviewing several real estate agents to sell our home, we decided to work with the Kenoyer team to sell our Bellingham house. Both Chet and Gina began to work with us months before selling, making suggestions on fix ups, landscaping and painting that could increase the value of our home. Communication is very important to us, and we found that every question and phone call was returned quickly. We made a solid plan on when to list on MLS and when we finally went on the market, I was impressed by the tools they used to show the home at its best. They arranged professional photography, high end brochures, arranged for house cleaning and painters, and organized home staging. In 4 days, we received several offers above asking price and the team did a great job negotiating a smooth sale. We were really impressed working with the Kenoyers and am quite certain their years of experience and "family" team approach helped bring more and higher offers to the table.
